title: Ireland
description: This is a painting I did of a town in Northern Ireland.  My girlfriend, her family and vacationed here in 2011 and it was a place.

title: Mother's Quilt
description: My mother is a fantastic quilter and I wanted to give her a painting for Christmas one year; so this seemed like the perfect subject.

title: Class 1
description: Class painting of a couple laundry detergent bottles.

title: Class 2
description: Class painting of a basket of leaves.  I really like the abstract nature of it.

title: Parisian Men
description: Tsana and I found these old men having a *deep* conversation in one of the lovely parks around Paris.

title: Orange Flower
description: This is one of the first paintings I have ever done.

title: Class 3
description: This is one of the first painting I did in my painting class with Rosetta.

title: Eiffel Tower
description: I learned the *impasto* technique in class, so I tried to something abstract of the Eiffel tower with this technique.

title: Class 5
description: Class painting of some apples and flowers.
